info.name: Web Sankul API
info.description:
Auto-generated Postman Collection for Web Sankul backend.

Variables:
- {{baseUrl}} — API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:3000)
- {{accessToken}} — client (mobile/web app) Bearer token
- {{adminToken}} — admin dashboard Bearer token
- {{educatorToken}} — educator Bearer token
- {{promoterToken}} — promoter Bearer token
- {{promoterRefreshToken}} — promoter refresh token

Conventions:
- Every protected route carries Authorization: Bearer <token>.
- Path params use Postman variables with dummy ObjectId 65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1.
- Plan/price durations are in MONTHS (integer).
- Endpoints returning playback URLs follow the encrypted /v1/lecture contract.

request.description: Admin login with email + password. Public.
Bootstrap first admin (public) or create admin (super_admin only).
Revoke every outstanding token for this admin across devices.
Update admin profile (supports image upload via multipart).
Get pre-requisites (roles list etc.) for administrator forms. Requires super_admin role.
Get single administrator. Requires super_admin role.
Toggle administrator active status. Requires super_admin role.
Get role by ID. Requires super_admin role.
Get permissions assigned to a role. Requires super_admin role.
Sync (replace) the permissions on a role. Requires super_admin role.
Permission catalog registry (code-defined). Readable by admin and super_admin.
Permissions grouped by category. Requires super_admin role.
Deprecated (HTTP 410). Permissions are now defined in the code catalog registry.
Get single permission. Requires super_admin role.
List roles holding this permission. Requires super_admin role.
List permission categories. Requires super_admin role.
Deprecated (HTTP 410). Categories are derived from the code catalog.
Get single permission category. Requires super_admin role.

Delete permission category. Requires super_admin role.
Returns the static list of guards (web, educator, promoter). Requires super_admin role.

Returns prerequisites (educators, parent categories) for the form. Permission: videoCategory.manage
List video categories. status enum: true|false. sort_by enum: name|order|created_at|updated_at. Permission: videoCategory.manage

Create a goal (multipart with image). title and labels are required. Permission: goal.manage (super_admin only)

Update a goal (multipart). Permission: goal.manage (super_admin only)
Delete a goal. Permission: goal.manage (super_admin only)

Delete a package category. Permission: master.manage

  "name": "3 Month Basic Updated",
  "duration": 3,
  "price": 1799,
  "withMaterial": false,
  "materialPrice": 0,
  "isDefault": false,
  "status": true
}

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 of raw body using webhook secret. NO Bearer auth — public endpoint.

request.description: PUBLIC endpoint called by Razorpay. NO Bearer token — authenticity is verified via x-razorpay-signature header.
PUBLIC endpoint called by Streamos when recordings are ready. NO Bearer token.

List the customer's saved payout bank accounts.
Save a payout bank account. IFSC must match /^[A-Z]{4}0[A-Z0-9]{6}$/ ; account number 9-18 digits and must equal confirmAccountNumber.
Update a saved bank account. All fields optional; if both account-number fields are provided they must match.

query.description: true to restrict to categories with active LiveCourses

query.description: ISO timestamp — return messages strictly before this time (pagination cursor).

query.description: If true, only sessions starting in the future.

Schedule-folder detail screen (sessions + videos under a folder).
Single lecture playback payload for a live course folder video. Returns encrypted video URLs matching the /v1/lecture contract.
Create/upsert a reminder for a live session. minutesBefore is optional (default applied if omitted, max ~1440).

Detail incl. content categories, price plans, active subscription, daysLeft.
Papers grouped by content category, with attemptState (start | retake) per exam.
Unified resume-learning cards across course / package / live course, with resumeNext hero card.
Playback heartbeat for a recorded live session. Both fields capped at 24h. ≥95% marks completion.

List banner slides for a screen.

query.description: Optional module name; returns single doc when provided.

request.description: Terms & conditions content. Returns array when `module` omitted, single doc otherwise.

Best-effort activity log. event (1–100), entityType (≤50), entityId, duration (int ≥0), metadata (object).
Legacy old-API endpoint to submit exam answers. timing: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS. test length must match exam.questionCount.
